title: Bot Instances
subtitle: Manage bot service units, Agent modes, plugin policy, and message-platform routing bindings.
deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}" from the current config draft?

form.agentConfigHint: Required for full mode. Relative to data, for example agents/full-agent.toml.

validation.title: The current bot config has validation issues
validation.idFormat: Bot ID can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens, and dots, and must start with a letter or number.
validation.requiredAgentConfig: Full Agent mode requires an Agent config file.
validation.requiredSessionPatterns: At least one session pattern is required.
